medialive.input.inputsourcerequest.Passw.Description: The password parameter that holds the password for accessing the upstream system. The password parameter applies only if the upstream system requires credentials.

medialive.input.inputsourcerequest.Url.Description: For a pull input, the URL where MediaLive pulls the source content from.

medialive.input.inputsourcerequest.Usern.Description: The user name to connect to the upstream system. The user name applies only if the upstream system requires credentials.
